heading: Step 2: Switch to the database that contains the collection for which you want to create the index.
body:
To switch, run the following command:

```javascript
use <DATABASE-NAME>
```

Here, `<DATABASE-NAME>` is the name of the database you
want to use.

> **Example:** For example, to switch to the `sample_mflix` database,
> which contains the `movies` collection, run the
> following command:
>
> ```javascript
> use sample_mflix
> ```
